NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-02-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTF ONYEBUCHI PRESENT IN PRO PER. DEFT LOWRIE PRESENT IN PRO PER. PLTF AND DEFT AGREE THAT POSSESSION OF PREMISES HAS ALREADY BEEN RETURNED TO PLTF AS DEFT HAS MOVED. PLTF STATES HE INTENDS TO DISM THE ACTION AND SO DEFT LOWRIE AGREES TO WAIVE ALL CLAIMS TO COSTS IF DISML IS FILED. COURT GIVES PLTF A FORM FOR DISML WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PLTF SIGNS IT AND DELIVERS IT TO ROOM 205. JURY TRIAL DATE OF 5/8/96 IS VACATED.
